description: Style noteThis john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined spread collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it in the conference room or during after-hours dinner. An office-ready wardrobe essential, wear this with dark chinos and a pair of Oxfords. For a classier look, throw on a blazer over this shirt. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots!Product DetailsKhaki shirt with red checks, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, two pockets with buttoned flaps on the chest, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean or machine wash with like colours onlyUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitJohn Players' Trim FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
